original_statement: Netherlands aims for quarter-finals or better at 2026 World Cup [Michael Statham, April 2026]
resolution_criteria: Netherlands reaches at least the quarterfinal stage of the 2026 FIFA World Cup.
outcome_proof: Netherlands reached the Round of 32 but were eliminated by Morocco on penalties and did not reach the quarterfinals.
author: Michael Statham

original_statement: Ecuador is more than capable of getting out of its group and matching its 2006 run to the last 16 at the 2026 FIFA World Cup [tough, hard-to-beat style].
resolution_criteria: Ecuador advances from the group stage to at least the round of 16 of the 2026 FIFA World Cup, matching or exceeding its 2006 performance.
outcome_proof: Ecuador advanced from the group stage to the Round of 32 but were eliminated by Mexico (0-2) and did not reach the Round of 16.
author: Joe Mewis

original_statement: Mexico will trouble teams in the second half of the 2026 FIFA World Cup tournament [as host nation with recent form].
resolution_criteria: Mexico advances from the group stage and reaches at least the round of 16 of the 2026 FIFA World Cup.
outcome_proof: Mexico advanced from the group stage and reached the Round of 16 (lost to England).
author: Joe Mewis

original_statement: Norway reaches the knockout stages of the 2026 FIFA World Cup [hosted in USA/Canada/Mexico; first appearance since 1998 with golden generation].
resolution_criteria: Norway advances from the group stage to the knockout stages of the 2026 FIFA World Cup, as determined by the official FIFA group standings and bracket.
outcome_proof: Norway advanced from the group stage and reached the quarterfinals.
author: Joe Mewis

original_statement: Sweden has the chance to surge into the final stages of the 2026 FIFA World Cup [under Graham Potter with Gyokeres and Isak].
resolution_criteria: Sweden advances from the group stage and reaches at least the round of 16 of the 2026 FIFA World Cup.
outcome_proof: Sweden finished third in Group F and advanced to the Round of 32 as one of the best third-placed teams.
author: Joe Mewis

original_statement: Uruguay does not advance from the group stage at the 2026 FIFA World Cup [surprising early exit under Bielsa].
resolution_criteria: Uruguay does not finish in the top two of its group and does not advance to the knockout stage of the 2026 FIFA World Cup.
outcome_proof: Uruguay finished third or fourth in its group and did not advance to the knockout stage.
author: Gab Marcotti

original_statement: Portugal reaches at least the quarterfinals of the 2026 FIFA World Cup [hosted in USA/Canada/Mexico as a strong underdog capable of beating any team].
resolution_criteria: Portugal reaches at least the quarterfinal stage of the 2026 FIFA World Cup, as determined by the official FIFA knockout bracket published after the round of 16.
outcome_proof: Portugal reached the Round of 16 but were eliminated by Spain and did not reach the quarterfinals.
author: Mark Ogden

original_statement: United States exits in the group stage at the 2026 FIFA World Cup [as host nation under pressure].
resolution_criteria: The United States does not advance from its group stage at the 2026 FIFA World Cup and exits the tournament.
outcome_proof: The United States finished first in Group D and advanced to the Round of 16 (did not exit in the group stage).
author: Mark Ogden

original_statement: Senegal makes a deep run at the 2026 FIFA World Cup [hosted in USA/Canada/Mexico, similar to Morocco in 2022].
resolution_criteria: Senegal advances from the group stage to at least the round of 16 of the 2026 FIFA World Cup, as determined by the official FIFA results.
outcome_proof: Senegal advanced from the group stage to the Round of 32 but were eliminated there and did not reach the Round of 16.
author: Connor O'Halloran

original_statement: Australia is the most surprising team not to advance from the group stage at the 2026 FIFA World Cup.
resolution_criteria: Australia does not finish in the top two of its group and does not advance to the knockout stage of the 2026 FIFA World Cup.
outcome_proof: Australia finished second in Group D and advanced to the knockout stage (Round of 32).
author: James Olley

original_statement: Mexico benefits from altitude as host nation and reaches the quarterfinals of the 2026 FIFA World Cup.
resolution_criteria: Mexico reaches the quarterfinal stage of the 2026 FIFA World Cup, benefiting from home conditions including altitude, as determined by the official FIFA knockout bracket.
outcome_proof: Mexico reached the Round of 16 but were eliminated by England and did not reach the quarterfinals.
author: James Olley

original_statement: Argentina finishes first in its group at the 2026 FIFA World Cup [Group J].
resolution_criteria: Argentina finishes in first place in its assigned group at the 2026 FIFA World Cup, as determined by the official FIFA group standings.
outcome_proof: Argentina finished first in its group, as confirmed by the official FIFA group standings (they later reached the final).
author: Chris Sutton

original_statement: Belgium finishes first in its group at the 2026 FIFA World Cup [Group G].
resolution_criteria: Belgium finishes in first place in its assigned group at the 2026 FIFA World Cup, as determined by the official FIFA group standings.
outcome_proof: Belgium finished first in Group G with 5 points, ahead of Egypt.
author: Chris Sutton

original_statement: Brazil finishes first in its group at the 2026 FIFA World Cup [Group C].
resolution_criteria: Brazil finishes in first place in its assigned group at the 2026 FIFA World Cup, as determined by the official FIFA group standings.
outcome_proof: Brazil finished first in Group C with 7 points (ahead of Morocco on goal difference).
author: Chris Sutton

original_statement: Canada finishes second in its group at the 2026 FIFA World Cup [Group B].
resolution_criteria: Canada finishes in second place in its assigned group at the 2026 FIFA World Cup, as determined by the official FIFA group standings.
outcome_proof: Canada finished second in Group B behind Switzerland.
author: Chris Sutton

original_statement: Colombia finishes first in its group at the 2026 FIFA World Cup [Group K].
resolution_criteria: Colombia finishes in first place in its assigned group at the 2026 FIFA World Cup, as determined by the official FIFA group standings.
outcome_proof: Colombia finished first in Group K with 7 points.
author: Chris Sutton

original_statement: England finishes first in its group at the 2026 FIFA World Cup [Group L].
resolution_criteria: England finishes in first place in its assigned group at the 2026 FIFA World Cup, as determined by the official FIFA group standings.
outcome_proof: England finished first in Group L with 7 points.
author: Chris Sutton

original_statement: Germany finishes first in its group at the 2026 FIFA World Cup [Group E].
resolution_criteria: Germany finishes in first place in its assigned group at the 2026 FIFA World Cup, as determined by the official FIFA group standings.
outcome_proof: Germany finished first in Group E with 6 points.
author: Chris Sutton

original_statement: Japan finishes first in its group at the 2026 FIFA World Cup [Group F].
resolution_criteria: Japan finishes in first place in its assigned group at the 2026 FIFA World Cup, as determined by the official FIFA group standings.
outcome_proof: Japan finished second in Group F behind the Netherlands.
author: Chris Sutton

original_statement: Paraguay finishes second in its group at the 2026 FIFA World Cup [Group D].
resolution_criteria: Paraguay finishes in second place in its assigned group at the 2026 FIFA World Cup, as determined by the official FIFA group standings.
outcome_proof: Paraguay finished third in Group D (Australia finished second).
author: Chris Sutton

original_statement: Senegal finishes first in its group at the 2026 FIFA World Cup [Group I].
resolution_criteria: Senegal finishes in first place in its assigned group at the 2026 FIFA World Cup, as determined by the official FIFA group standings.
outcome_proof: Senegal finished third in Group I behind France and Norway.
author: Chris Sutton

original_statement: South Korea finishes first in its group at the 2026 FIFA World Cup [Group A].
resolution_criteria: South Korea finishes in first place in its assigned group at the 2026 FIFA World Cup, as determined by the official FIFA group standings.
outcome_proof: South Korea did not finish first in its group.
author: Chris Sutton

original_statement: Spain finishes first in its group at the 2026 FIFA World Cup [Group H].
resolution_criteria: Spain finishes in first place in its assigned group at the 2026 FIFA World Cup, as determined by the official FIFA group standings.
outcome_proof: Spain finished first in Group H with 7 points.
author: Chris Sutton

original_statement: World Cup 2026 winner is one of: Portugal, Spain, France, Brazil [Wesley Sneijder, December 2025]
resolution_criteria: The winner of the 2026 FIFA World Cup is one of Portugal, Spain, France, or Brazil, as determined by the official FIFA final match result.
outcome_proof: Spain won the 2026 FIFA World Cup (beat Argentina in the final). Spain was one of the four teams listed in the prediction.
author: Wesley Sneijder

original_statement: Netherlands wins 2026 World Cup, defeats Portugal in final [Joachim Klement, May 2026]
resolution_criteria: Netherlands is declared the winner of the 2026 FIFA World Cup, as determined by the official FIFA final match result.
outcome_proof: Netherlands did not win the 2026 FIFA World Cup. Spain were the champions.
author: Joachim Klement

original_statement: Netherlands performs well in Group F but not expected to win tournament [Michael Statham, May 2026]
resolution_criteria: Netherlands does not win the 2026 FIFA World Cup, as determined by the official FIFA final result.
outcome_proof: Netherlands did not win the 2026 FIFA World Cup (eliminated in the Round of 32).
author: Michael Statham

original_statement: Netherlands reaches final / strong Oranje performance in Group F and beyond [Süleyman Öztürk, June 2026]
resolution_criteria: Netherlands appears in the FIFA World Cup 2026 final match, as determined by the official FIFA final fixture.
outcome_proof: Netherlands did not reach the final. The final was Spain vs Argentina.
author: Süleyman Öztürk

original_statement: Portugal wins World Cup 2026 (Netherlands in final) [Süleyman Öztürk, June 2026]
resolution_criteria: Portugal is declared the winner of the 2026 FIFA World Cup, as determined by the official FIFA final match result.
outcome_proof: Portugal did not win the 2026 FIFA World Cup. Spain were the champions.
author: Süleyman Öztürk

original_statement: Netherlands reaches the final of the 2026 FIFA World Cup [hosted in USA/Canada/Mexico, via victory over Spain in semifinals per Klement model].
resolution_criteria: Netherlands appears in the FIFA World Cup 2026 final match, as determined by the official FIFA final fixture.
outcome_proof: Netherlands did not reach the final. The final was Spain vs Argentina.
author: Joachim Klement

original_statement: France will win the 2026 FIFA World Cup [hosted in USA/Canada/Mexico, provided there is no in-house fighting within the squad].
resolution_criteria: France is declared the winner of the 2026 FIFA World Cup by the official FIFA final match result on or before 2026-07-19.
outcome_proof: France did not win the 2026 FIFA World Cup. Spain were the champions.
author: Alan Shearer
